message:
fix(sling): add cross-rig guard to prevent slinging beads to wrong rig (gt-myecw)

Polecats work in their rig worktree and cannot fix code owned by another
rig. Add prefix-based validation that checks whether a bead prefix matches
the target rig before spawning a polecat or hooking the bead.

The guard:
- Extracts the bead prefix (e.g., bd-) and looks up its owning rig
- Compares against the target rig extracted from the agent path
- Blocks mismatches with a clear error message
- Skips town-level beads (hq-*) and unknown prefixes
- Can be overridden with --force

Applied to single sling, batch sling, and dead-polecat fallback paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
